Event: Darkness Castle Siege Feb 2025
Event Date: 09/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: D25


Other locations the gear can be found
Siege Rammer Chest
Starlight Daggers

When attacking, has a [13%-14%] chance of dealing [110%-125%] damage in 5 seconds.
The unit throws a dagger at a random enemy every 2 sec. The dagger deals physical damage equal to 25% of the target's max health and applies one of the effects:
If the dagger hits a warrior, armor is removed from them. They lose 55% of their armor stats and can't use armor abilities for 3,5 sec.
If the dagger hits a mage, it silences them.
The enemy unit can't use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 3,5 sec.
If the dagger hits an archer, they are disarmed for 3,5 sec. The disarmed unit can't use weapon abilities for the duration.

Requirements: 98-100
